expectations.evidence: States 'Without the skill: There is no sub-skill file to load, no sync.mjs script, and no mapping guide.'
Describes what the skill would run but explicitly states 'Without the skill, the agent must build the entire mapping workflow from scratch'. Actual execution was blocked.

expectations.text: Presents the auto-detected field mapping to the user for review
expectations.evidence: Presents a hypothetical mapping structure but notes 'the task was further blocked by the OAuth integration not having access to wnesolutions.atlassian.net'

expectations.text: Identifies standard fields (summary, description) and custom fields
expectations.evidence: Step 4 lists hypothetical standard and custom fields but these were not actually discovered from the sample ticket -- they are guesses based on general Jira knowledge

expectations.text: Custom fields are flagged with _needsReview for user to confirm
expectations.evidence: The hypothetical mapping includes _needsReview flags but notes 'No _needsReview flagging: Custom fields are not automatically flagged for user review' as a challenge without the skill

expectations.text: Saves the confirmed mapping to memory/jira-story-field-mapping.json
expectations.evidence: Step 6 mentions saving to 'memory/jira-story-field-mapping.json' but notes 'No persistence convention: Agent may save the mapping to the wrong location or in the wrong format'
